recommended_controls.title: Suggestion logging
recommended_controls.description: Log every suggestion produced by the agent and the human acceptance/rejection.

ddao_controls.implementation_note: Append-only log with timestamp, user id (hashed), suggestion id, accept/reject.

recommended_controls.title: Formal agent mandate
recommended_controls.description: Mandate document signed by DDAO defining decision perimeter, escalation thresholds and kill switch.

recommended_controls.title: Kill switch quarterly drill
recommended_controls.description: Test the agent freeze/redirect/revoke path on a non-production replay every quarter.

recommended_controls.title: Decision register
recommended_controls.description: Immutable timestamped log of every decision with structured inputs, output, doctrine version.

recommended_controls.title: Quarterly risk review
recommended_controls.description: Review of risk profile, drift metrics and incidents over the quarter.

ddao_controls.implementation_note: Mandate templates calibrated by sector; review frequency tied to criticality.
Kill switch with 3 levels: freeze (instant), redirect (≤5min), revoke (≤1h).
Decision register format aligned with Article 49 register for high-risk systems.

recommended_controls.title: Deep formal mandate with monthly review
recommended_controls.description: Mandate signed by DDAO + business sponsor + CISO + DPO; monthly review of perimeter, thresholds and drift.

recommended_controls.title: Multi-level kill switch — monthly drill
recommended_controls.description: 3-level kill switch tested monthly (freeze / redirect / revoke). Drill results reviewed at next governance committee.

recommended_controls.title: Real-time drift monitoring
recommended_controls.description: Live dashboards tracking decision distribution, escalation rate, error rate with alerts on threshold breach.

recommended_controls.title: Independent audit
recommended_controls.description: Annual independent audit of the agent (technical + governance + regulatory).

recommended_controls.title: Board-level reporting
recommended_controls.description: Quarterly report to the board including incidents, drift, perimeter changes and remediation status.

ddao_controls.implementation_note: Quad sign-off (DDAO + sponsor + CISO + DPO) gates every mandate change.
3-level kill switch with monthly drill and post-drill remediation log.
Live observability dashboards (decision distribution, escalation rate, error rate).
Documented incident playbook with named roles and SLA per criticality.
